title: Kill la Kill Custom GUI Pack
description: This is a GUI-only resource pack inspired by the show "Kill La Kill." It is designed to work seamlessly with other resource packs
body:
**![](https://i.imgur.com/ulkNDzb.png)**

**Introduction:**
This is a GUI-only resource pack inspired by the show "Kill La Kill." It is designed to work seamlessly with other resource packs—just place it on top of your existing pack. I've customized the hot bar and experimented with adding different images to each container. The chosen palette features blue and red, but I'm open to suggestions for other color schemes like yellow and blue. Feel free to comment with your preferences, and if you encounter any bugs, report them so I can address them promptly.

**Community Engagement:**
Join our Discord server to suggest and vote for the next pack, participate in anime discussions, and have the chance to win Discord Nitro giveaways every month. [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/H8t9ApR0WZs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
